creatives.niche_raw: indie game developers, maker/hobbyist coders, people who want to make and share tiny games, creative programmers
creatives.angle_raw: constraints spark creativity — make a whole game in one sitting, share it instantly; the cozy development environment

claims: PICO-8 is a  fantasy console  for making, sharing and playing tiny games and
mechanism: built-in sprite, map, sound, music editors
problem_um_raw: The harsh limitations of PICO-8 are carefully chosen to be fun to work with, to encourage small but expressive designs, and to give cartridges made with PICO-8 their own particular look and feel.

claims: Create a whole game or program in one sitting without needing to leave the cosy development environment!
mechanism: all creative tools built into the console (code, music, sound, sprites, maps)

notes: PICO-8 is software (fantasy console), not hardware. Price $14.99. The 'constraints spark creativity' frame is a distinctive angle — limits as a feature, not a flaw. Learn-to-code and game-making niche. Very active community (Cartverse, SPLORE browser, forum). No physical product, relevant as a competing attention/budget destination for the maker/code-your-own-game niche.
